subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the power of the Friend, the days of vain idols that have veiled mankind from the Dawning-Place of Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بقوت خلیل ایام اصنام هوائیه را که سبب احتجاب ناس از مطلع نور
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @idolatry, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
